subject: SurfaceMaterialSwatch
adopted_concept: 3D environment surface material swatches for hub and three region folded-reliquary floors, low walls, route edges, and gate panels.
product_line_role: Route Surface / Low Boundary material reference
motif_limit_policy: Regional hints remain material-state differences; no standalone plant, pipe, gear, crystal forest, crown, text, or external-IP motif.

asset_request.source: inferred because no visual asset_request.yaml was present in the checkout for this 3D material swatch family
out_of_scope_asset_requests: Assets/Art/ModelRigAnimation/Enemy/MeleeShardling/SealedLockRelic_v0.1.0/asset_request.yaml is a model/rig animation request and was not used for this surface material request.
asset_request.usage_context: FOURFOLD ECHOES 3D environment material reference for hub floor/low boundary and R01/R02/R03 route surfaces, gates, and tool receiver panels

constraints.texture_budget: 512px atlas for BaseColor/Mask/Normal/Emissive plus 256px per-variant map exports
constraints.background: none; texture maps are the surface itself and preview canvas is transparent
constraints.tile_mode: seam-safe optional tiling with uniform borders

prompt_contract:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Unity 3D environment material swatch atlas with BaseColor, Mask, Normal, and Emissive maps
Primary request: compact FOURFOLD ECHOES folded reliquary surface material swatches for hub and three regions, no text, no decorative background
Style/medium: procedural 2D raster PBR-intent texture, folded reliquary miniature product line
Subject: four low surface material swatches built from broad folded slab planes, fourfold inlays, chunky chipped tabs, and restrained functional signal threads
Composition/framing: square 256px swatches and 512px atlas quadrants, central readable motif, seamless-safe edges for optional tiled use
Color palette: polished ivory hub, moss-weathered R01, scorched charcoal/rust R02, cold blue-violet R03, shared warm gold and restrained functional signals
Materials/textures: stylized PBR intent, broad color planes, sparse bevel-like normal detail, no photoreal grime, no noisy scan texture
Constraints: PNG maps, no labels, no letters, no watermark, no external IP style names, variations differ by silhouette inlay layout, material temperature, chip shape, and signal placement rather than color alone
Avoid: generic tiled floor noise, dense moss carpet, pipes/gears as primary motif, crystal forest, text/runic letters, photoreal dirt, fine decorative clutter

unity_import.texture_type: Default for BaseColor/Mask/Emissive; Normal Map for Normal textures
unity_import.wrap_mode: Repeat for material maps; Clamp for preview

texture_maps.Mask_channels: R=occlusion/silhouette depth, G=roughness group, B=emissive mask, A=alpha/coverage

variants.name: HubPolished
variants.difference: clean quartered ivory slabs, straight warm inlay seams, soft blue return signal socket

variants.name: R01Weathered
variants.difference: rounded chipped slabs, low weathered growth tabs under 15% motif budget, green tool signal slit

variants.name: R02Scorched
variants.difference: scorched folded plate, bent heavy tabs, amber heat-route signal and darker charcoal mass

variants.name: R03Cold
variants.difference: cold sharp chips, violet split inlay, pale blue lens signal with darker cool base plane

qc.edge_bleed: none detected on preview; material map borders are uniform for seam safety
qc.tile_seam: left/right and top/bottom border pixels match for each 256px material map
